descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average crystallite diameter in polycrystalline material
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties via Hall-Petch relationship

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to single mean value
quality.notes: loses variance and distribution skewness information

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic orientation difference between adjacent grains
descriptors.rationale: distinguishes low/high angle boundaries affecting recrystallization

quality.loss_reason: continuous distribution binned into discrete histogram
quality.truncation_error: low - ten bins capture key features
quality.notes: binning loses exact misorientation angles per boundary

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation history and mechanical anisotropy

quality.loss_reason: distribution of aspect ratios reduced to mean
quality.truncation_error: moderate - heterogeneity in grain shapes lost
quality.notes: loses grain orientation and shape distribution information

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.rationale: quantifies anisotropy in mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: full orientation distribution function reduced to scalar
quality.truncation_error: high - texture type and symmetry lost
quality.notes: different texture types yield identical intensity values

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: affects diffusion pathways and mechanical strengthening

quality.loss_reason: derived from grain size, loses topology information
quality.truncation_error: moderate - grain connectivity and shape lost
quality.notes: redundant with d1 but loses geometric details

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: measures lattice defects controlling strength and recovery

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and dislocation types averaged
quality.truncation_error: moderate - heterogeneity and character information lost
quality.notes: loses edge/screw character and spatial clustering

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.physical_meaning: low-angle boundary cells within deformed grains
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation state and recovery potential

quality.loss_reason: distributions reduced to three statistical moments
quality.truncation_error: moderate - spatial arrangement and variance lost
quality.notes: captures key features but loses topology

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic strain energy from lattice defects
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recovery and recrystallization

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and defect sources averaged
quality.truncation_error: moderate - local driving force variations lost
quality.notes: redundant with d6, loses heterogeneity information

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of strain-free recrystallized material

representation.notes: zero is unrecrystallized, unity is complete

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution of recrystallized regions lost
quality.truncation_error: moderate - nucleation sites and kinetics lost
quality.notes: loses morphology and spatial clustering of nuclei
